GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Forever New is ensuring its staple styles are that much more sustainable", "Forever New has officially announced it's now working on making its much-loved styles and sought-after designs a whole lot more sustainable with the help of TENCEL. Promoting fibres made from sustainably sourced wood, TENCEL is here to help you ensure you know exactly what the goods you purchase are made from, and where exactly its materials originated. Best known for providing women with a slew of styles that promise to make them feel like the very best version of themselves, retailer Forever New is proud to be partnering with TENCEL in order to minimise its impact on the planet as a whole. Intent on developing sustainable environmental practices at every stage of its business, Forever New is adopting the use of these eco-friendly fibres in an effort to help you live an eco-conscious lifestyle–meaning there's no excuse not to be taking sustainability seriously in all aspects of your daily life. Forever New initially began incorporating TENCEL's eco-friendly Lyocell fibres into its line of clothing just last year. Now, approximately 90 per cent of the retailer's denim separates range utilises the benefits of the sustainable raw material. From the ever so chic Mika Popover Roll Sleeve Shirt and the sophisticated Eliza Blazer Jumpsuit, to the beloved Carmen Longline Waterfall Jacket and the on-trend Amber Cargo Pant, some of your favourite Forever New staples are now made with TENCEL's Lyocell fibres. The TENCEL Lyocell fibres used by Forever New in its various items of clothing–which are derived from certified sustainable wood sourced from sustainably managed forests–are 100 per cent bio-based fibers with botanic origin that are produced via environmentally responsible methods. As such, these renewable raw materials are compostable and biodegradable, meaning they are able to be integrated back into nature, in turn maintaining a much-needed environmental balance. Championing ethical supply and encouraging its consumers to shop for products and clothing made from sustainable raw materials, Forever New's partnership with TENCEL is giving you the chance to shop clothing from the retailer as a conscious consumer, with far more clarity around where your purchases have come from and who has made them. As for how these Lyocell fibres–which can be combined with other fibres such as cotton, wool and silk if you're looking to enhance a fabric's functionality– and feel on the skin? Thanks to their eco-friendly nature, they prove strong yet soft to the touch, and they just so happen to boast enhanced breathability, moisture absorption, colour vibrancy and thermal regulation. What more could you possibly want? Want to learn more about TENCEL and their sustainability-driven #FeelsSoRight campaign with Forever New? Click here."
